item.title: Gawd Dammit! Chances missed are chances wasted.

item.title: Down 100 pounds. Love a round number!
item.description:
Sept. '22, June '23, October '23, and yesterday, January 3rd, 2024. Told yinz I'd be back when I hit another nice round number. And I even smiled this time.
How I'm doing it: calories in, calories out. 1300 kcal/day limit and tracking everything on the LoseIt app. I didn't get serious about my weight loss until December of 2022. I started lifting weights in March of 2023, and now I lift heavy 3x/week (took two weeks off to travel for the holidays but we back baby). I still can't get into cardio but I'm making an effort to go salsa dancing with my husband once a week so maybe that counts. I'm still 21lbs overweight, and about 40lbs from my goal weight. I'm 5'10" so my healthiest weight is 145-155. Hoping to hit that by the end of the summer and then really GET SWOLE. It's been incredibly helpful to share my journey here -- I've come back and read the comments you all have left on my two prior posts when I'm just gritting my teeth through one of the plateaus where my weight doesn't budge for three weeks, and wanting to come back and post another progress pic has been really motivating. See you all when I hit ... Hmm. What should my next milestone be?
Edward R. Purrow tax.
item.dc:creator: ProducerTory

item.title: The 379th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 33
item.description:
HOLA! Soy Dora!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Make Clowns Sexy Again
My favorite music overlay for this gif
DISCLAIMER: Domestic Abusive is not funny
I don't see a problem
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: It’s the dynamics. I couldn’t tell how often I had the volume turned up in order to hear more subdued dialogue when seconds later, there’s a gunshot or sound effect that sounds like it’s been fired in the house

item.title: Fuckin bottom shelf
item.description:
I won't only be "30" ...but "in my 30s" Oh god
They got me last year...
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! (Thigh highs are still welcome) Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Cancer Sucks
item.description: My wife has Stage 4 Metastatic Breast Cancer. She has been battling for 7 years since she was 20. She just had a seizure on Christmas morning that took her out for a week. I work as her caretaker so I do not get paid for the days that we were in the hospital which will make it hard for us to pay our bills this month. I've been looking for things I could do at home to make extra money but it takes money to make money and that's what we don't have. Wish life was simpler and cures could be found and given https://gofund.me/6353f9d9
item.dc:creator: HollywoodK

item.title: Damn, evolution, you're amazing
item.description: Endemic to western Iran and over the border region with Iraq, the spider-tailed horned viper has a unique tail with a bulb-like end that is bordered by long drooping scales that give it the appearance of a spider. The tail tip is waved around and used to lure insectivorous birds to within striking range.
item.dc:creator: Hauntologist2

item.title: Images of Note: I'm so proud of you Rajshahi Indian Restaurant.
item.description:
Horses
Now I wanna Burrito.
hell yeah
hell yeah
WELL IT'S FUCKIN' GOING!
I was served this meme and I don't understand how I got served an ad for an Australian indian place.
Needs more pockets.
GET IN LOSER WE'RE PLAYING BRONY MUSIC.
That is a fucking fit.
THERE IS A BISHOP OF GAYLORD
He's also running for President. https://www.afromanforpresident.com/
put audiobook on.
b o n k
a creechur
Stephen Hawking is on the Epstein List.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
